name: Reliance on Reverse DNS Resolution for a Security-Critical Action
description: The product performs reverse DNS lookups and uses the result for security-critical decisions without verifying that the IP address truly maps to the claimed hostname. Attackers can spoof DNS through server compromise or cache poisoning to bypass authentication.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL node provides DNS resolution result that flows to AUTH or CONTROL node for access decisions without a CONTROL node verifying forward-reverse DNS consistency
